A_INDEX_PRIORITY_HIGH.description: Important pages that should be indexed: real calculators, decisions, widgets, blogs with demand

B_INDEX_PRIORITY_MEDIUM.description: Useful pages: supporting guides, niche calculators, comparison pages, blogs with finance intent

C_PARENT_TRANSFER.description: Thin tool/scenario parameter pages where parent calculator should rank instead

D_LOW_VALUE_HOLD.description: Pages that should not be pushed now: static hubs, low-value blogs

E_CLEANUP_REVIEW.description: Pages needing cleanup review: auth pages, noindex candidates
